programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to DeBary, Florida to rescue a VFW post that is losing members and suffering a financial crisis due to confusion surrounding the leadership of the bar. He must not only rescue the post but also help them establish proper management.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Ashland City, Tennessee, Jon Taffer confronts a defiant owner who literally sits on a stool while his family's bar crumbles around him. With the business on the brink, Taffer must inspire this idle owner to stand up and fight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer sends Phil Wills and Danny Trejo to Houston, Texas, to rescue a business whose owner prefers to drink in the bar while his retired wife has to pick up the pieces.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to DeBary, Florida to rescue a VFW post that is losing members and suffering a financial crisis due to confusion surrounding the leadership of the bar. He must not only rescue the post but also help them establish proper management.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a businessman who bought a bar attached to a bowling alley but had never stepped foot in a bar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell Mom the Bar is Dead
programme.desc: An abrasive owner takes advantage of his mom's generosity to take over a craft beer bar from his landlord.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Fear and Molding on Pineapple Hill
programme.desc: Jon tries to help an owner who is unable to take control of her own bar or her explosive chef due to her crippling fear of failure and change.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After gambling his life savings on a run down Las Vegas bar, a desperate owner tries out a fetish night to whip up new business.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: A deep dive inside the minds of America's 19 most notorious serial killers.

programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must save a failing former smoker's haven in California from burning out for good.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A motorsports bar with a busty staff of cougars requires a new gimmick to thrive.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to help an owner of a Denver pool hall fulfill his American Dream.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A landlord and partner, who would rather paint fruit in the name of art than save his failing Ohio burger bar, clashes with bitter owners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Taffer tries to tame the rocket-like owner of the famed Cooper Rocket before he does himself in.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: So We Meet Again, Mr. Taffer
programme.desc: Mark and Ozzie face Jon Taffer a second time in hopes that he will rescue another one of their failing bars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A historical landmark bar, divided in profits and responsibility, pits brother and sister against one another.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to motivate the lethargic owner of The Fifth, who has been weighed down by his late father's failing legacy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two absentee owners who see their bar as more of an investment than a business refuse to engage with the staff or customers until Jon Taffer intervenes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A premiere billiards hall in Las Vegas is at risk of closing after it's owner struggles to recover from the effects of the pandemic and an inept manager.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer sends his long-time expert, Phil Wills to lead the rescue of a bar in San Marcos, California that is suffering from an identity crisis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Now that Gru has forsaken a life of crime to raise Margo, Agnes and Edith, he's trying to figure out how to provide for his new family. As he struggles with his responsibilities as a father, the Anti-Villain League, an organization dedicated to fighting evil, comes calling. The AVL sends Gru on a mission to capture the perpetrator of a spectacular heist, for who would be better than the world's greatest ex-villain to capture the individual who seeks to usurp his power.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. The reunited siblings soon find themselves in an uneasy alliance to take down the elusive Balthazar Bratt, a former 1980s child star who seeks revenge against the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Evolving from single-celled yellow organisms at the dawn of time, Minions live to serve, but find themselves working for a continual series of unsuccessful masters, from T. Rex to Napoleon. Without a master to grovel for, the Minions fall into a deep depression. But one minion, Kevin, has a plan; accompanied by his pals Stuart and Bob, Kevin sets forth to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. Their search leads them to Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever super-villainess.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

programme.desc: The new phenomenon -- senior citizens spend their days gaming.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: A Horse Walks Into a Bar
programme.desc: A western bar is plagued with drunk owners, a bank foreclosure and horse excrement.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer is in California attempting to turn around the fortunes of a bar called Extremes, which trades on the good looks and skimpy outfits of its waiting staff; the bar is less than a month from closing its doors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Overwhelming odors and frat house behavior at this hookah bar are causing profits to go up in smoke.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Out-of-control bartenders are too busy dancing on the bar to pour drinks until Taffer puts an end to the party.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An owner's social media mishaps have made him public enemy number one.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Take Me Out of the Bar Game
programme.desc: A retired professional baseball player now owns a bar and his intoxicated staff gives away his profits; Jon Taffer tries to save his business before he is forced to retire a second time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A pair of brothers can't see eye to eye on how the business is run, so one of them takes a run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: The Lights Come Back in Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Brother and sister duo from Puerto Rico find themselves in over their heads after Hurricane Maria destroyed their bar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Gibsonton, Fla., Jon must help rescue not only a failing bar but a broken marriage after the Covid pandemic destroyed both their business and their relationship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: A Drunk, a Fruit Fly, and a Knight Walk into a Bar
programme.desc: Mixologist Phil Wills rescues a filthy bar in Oxnard, Calif.; helping a newlywed couple realize their dream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer travels to Bowling Green, Kentucky, to revitalize a struggling bar plagued by a management crisis, as two bartenders contend for a leadership role after the current manager proves ineffectual in overseeing the bar's operations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
